The Boxtrolls (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,837,305Details
International Box Office $61,061,436
Worldwide Box Office $111,898,741
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,973,140
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,409,331
Total $17,382,471
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Boxtrolls, a community of quirky, mischievous creatures who have lovingly raised an orphaned human boy named Eggs in the amazing cavernous home they’ve built beneath the streets of Cheesebridge. When the town’s villain, Archibald Snatcher, comes up with a plot to get rid of the Boxtrolls, Eggs decides to venture above ground, “into the light,” where he meets and teams up with fabulously feisty Winnifred. Together, they devise a daring plan to save Eggs’ family.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,275,239 (34.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.94 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,464 opening theaters/3,464 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $74,405,253

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 26th, 2014 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: September 19th, 2014 (Wide) (Australia)
October 23rd, 2014 (Wide) (Germany)
November 7th, 2014 (Wide) (Argentina)
Video Release: January 20th, 2015 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action, some peril and mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2318, 4/16/2014)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Invented Language
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Geographical setting: Underground
Plot point: Coming of Age, Cross-Dressing, Dysfunctional Family, Inventor, Missing Child, Non-Chronological, Orphan, Rescue
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: Steampunk
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Stop-Motion Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Laika
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The Boxtrolls, a community of quirky, mischievous creatures who have lovingly raised an orphaned human boy named Eggs in the amazing cavernous home they’ve built beneath the streets of Cheesebridge. When the town’s villain, Archibald Snatcher, comes up with a plot to get rid of the Boxtrolls, Eggs decides to venture above ground, “into the light,” where he meets and teams up with fabulously feisty Winnifred. Together, they devise a daring plan to save Eggs’ family.
